[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A drawn, manga-style close-up shows a person’s face and upper torso, outlined by a thick red circle, with a small smiling emoji overlay at the bottom right.

Main Subject:
The main visual focus is a manga-style illustration of a partially shown person wearing a high-collared outfit with a textured pattern and dark triangular sections, with their head angled downward and their face partially visible; the person’s hair falls forward and is drawn with fine linework. A thick red circular outline surrounds the upper face and collar area.

Setting:
The background appears to be plain or lightly textured in the style of a comic panel, with no clear outdoor or indoor environment visible. Lighting is flat and monochrome, consistent with a black-and-white drawing.

Visual Details:
The image is primarily black and white with dot shading and fine line details in the hair and clothing. A thick red ring encircles part of the illustration, and a small red curved line or partial marking appears near the right side of the circle. At the bottom right, there is an emoji-like face with a wide smile and closed, arched eyes, wearing blue tear-like drops or headphones-like shapes around its head; the emoji sits over the manga image. The camera angle is close and cropped tightly around the face, hair, and collar.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a black-and-white manga-style drawing of a person’s upper body and face, highlighted by a thick red circle around the head and collar. A cheerful emoji graphic with blue elements overlays the lower right corner.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

[No readable text present in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- *(No visible/legible text to extract.)*

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to show a drawing/illustration with an emoji (laughing with tears), but there is no clear, readable textual content.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
